programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
Mossy feels unwell, so Oona offers to help by taking charge of the Shrew Crew for the day.
Oona learns to love her colourful beak.
Funny Faces is the funniest game ever in Sunny River.
Dad Baby: When Dad shows the kids how to use their old baby-harness, a new game is born: Dad Baby. However, dad is unprepared for the harsh realities of giving birth to a baby Bingo.
Chez Joubert: The students devise a plan to retrieve their confiscated toys from Joubert's house.
The Shape of The Black: Gibraltar offers a chance of no homework for a year to whoever captures his lake monster.
Daniel and Katerina go to the Enchanted Garden to pick strawberries, only to find that the strawberry plants are dead. They ask questions to help them understand what's happened.
Oxygen & Carbon are having fun playing video games at Sulfur's until one of the joysticks stops working.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'x', and they go on an adventure around the sound. They meet a Tyrannosaurus rex, a fox with chicken pox and an ox on a box!
The adventure-seeking superheroes race to fix the Leaning Tower of Pisa in Italy. But has it really been glitched?.
Mojo and Bo need Ted's help to pull a wobbly duck statue up Swoppiton Hill. But does Ted know the best way? And will there be anything left of the duck when they get there?
The Sneezy Stinky Sachet: A foul odor is pervading the city. The only one who can fix it is Monsieur Bobois, but he doesn't feel up to the task. Oli and Titus are certain he can.
Attack of the Zombellas: Fifi argues with Bella, who told her she sings off-key. But when Bella starts to sing, her shrill notes turn the townspeople into zombies.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: Playing Armadillo: Lex and Plu have to deliver their passenger, an armadillo named Hops, back home from his vacation.
Catch a Rainbow: When Odo accidentally loses Doodle's 'treasure' (a heart shaped rock), they go on a quest to reach the end of the rainbow where Odo is sure they'll find Doodle's treasure.
Whoops: When Doodle becomes embarrassed, she develops a cringe (she calls it a 'whoops') that spreads through camp.
When a cloudy night covers the twinkly stars, Hugo and Sonia discover other natural wonder close by. (SL)
When something Sonia and Hugo want isn't listed on the Family's Shopping List, they learn to appreciate what they do have. (SL)
Breathing Boom Treasure: Floating downstream on a raft, Fuzzy Yellow and Bennu fish for treasure, and find a musical adventure. (SL)
Mossy feels unwell, so Oona offers to help by taking charge of the Shrew Crew for the day.
Oona learns to love her colourful beak.
Funny Faces is the funniest game ever in Sunny River.
Detective Plom: Mae-Mae's vegetable patch is spoiled. Can detective Plom solve the mystery?
Henry meets a Cow and learns all about where milk comes from. Unfortunately the gate to the cow field has been left open and all the Cows have wandered off during the night.
Kite: Stanley helps Little Woo fly his kite, while Hattie is roasting some corn on her wind powered roaster.
Dinosaur: The school are creating a dinosaur to put on display at the museum.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Windmill Woes: After Thomas, Percy and Diesel accidentally break a windmill, they all tell Gordon different version of what happened. Can Gordon uncover the truth?
It's Time for a Community Jam: At the community jam, everyone makes music together. Gran Gran gives JoJo a shaker to join in with the band.
Home: Wendy finds a nightingale with a sore wing, so Mr Peek puts it in the aviary where they can keep an eye on it.
Peeks Might Fly: It's haircut day at the Zoo, and while Mr. Peek is giving the gorilla a trim, Violet gets her balloon stuck in a tree.
Tugann an grúpa spraoi cuairt ar thearmann dúlra Mr Lion, áit a bhfuil feithidí beaga bídeacha, míolta agus féileacáin. Tugann Pedro a pheata Stephen, an cipíneach leis.
Tugann Madame Gazelle húlahúp do ghrúpa spraoi Peppa. Caithfidh siad an húlahúp a choinneáil ag casadh ar a mbásta.
Rúbaí is in training for her big race. Síofra and Oisín make sure she is well prepared.
Pre-school series featuring an assortment of animal characters, including Una the Owl.
Pre-school series featuring an assortment of animal characters, focusing in this episode on Pip the Squirrel.
Simon and his friends talk about the things they would do if it weren't raining.
A Mess of Their Own: Reggie and the others are overjoyed to discover a forest full of fruits and eat until they are full, prompting them to take a nap.
Andy And The Ring Tailed Lemurs: When Andy accidentally breaks a plaster cast of a ring-tailed lemur's footprint that Mr Hammond made, it's up to Andy to put things right.
Mojo and Bo need Ted's help to pull a wobbly duck statue up Swoppiton Hill. But does Ted know the best way? And will there be anything left of the duck when they get there?

Amhrán Mistéireach: Cluineann MeMo agus BaBa fuaim álainn agus fiosraíonn siad cad as a bhfuil sí ag teacht.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Silky and Oona help a young whale who is lost in the lagoon.
Oona and Baba try to catch up with a very fast moth.
With a little help from his friends, Happy finds the thing he is great at.
Mum School: Bluey plays mum to a brood of bouncy balloons, including an irrepressible floater named Greeny. Mum and Bluey play 'Mum School'.
Elections: Leia discovers campaigning is hard work when she runs against Tobias for class president.
My Friend Lanky Lance: Oswaldo meets talented Lanky Lance who agrees to partner with him in the soda cap race.
While playing with his friends at school, Daniel decides he would like to spend some time alone.
Arsenic decides to play a trick on Sulfur & Phosphorus during their fishing trip, but his pesky plan soon starts to backfire.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'y', and they go on an adventure around the sound. They see some yo-yos and a yacht, do some yoga and even meet a yeti!
What goes up must come down as Grandmaster Glitch splash-lands in Lake Titicaca.
Mojo and Bo have to deliver a super fun singing valentine. But the problem is, they don't know who it's for. Or who it's from. And Preston is racing to beat them to it!
Tiny Bella!: Bella panics: she's missing an accessory. Without her complete set, she no longer feels perfect and leaves her dollhouse to live with the residents of Minusville.
Ghost Catchers: Mr. Bobois saw a ghost. What if Minusville is haunted? While Oli firmly believes it, Titus searches for tangible proof.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: Let It Snow: It's New Year's Eve, but our heroes aren't feeling festive. That's because it's 30 degrees outside, and there's no snow. Lex promises to get some snow for Trish, no matter what.
My Hero: Leonardo is convinced that Odo saved his life and sticks to Odo like glue causing Odo a lot of trouble.
The Eclipse: Odo and Doodle are given the job of explaining an eclipse to the other campers.
Sonia and Hugo look for imaginative ways to reach the top of their painting. (SL)
As Sonia feels frustrated she can't fasten her life jacket, her family playfully help her understand the importance of patience. (SL)
Carpet Honey Swamp: Moon invents a flying carpet powered by flies, and Fuzzy Yellow takes it for a test ride. (SL)
Silky and Oona help a young whale who is lost in the lagoon.
Oona and Baba try to catch up with a very fast moth.
With a little help from his friends, Happy finds the thing he is great at.
Snow Day: Phoebe and her friends enjoy a winter wonderland. Together with her friends, Phoebe must help to make a beautiful snowman before a snow storm arrives and makes it impossible.
Henry meets a friendly Rabbit. Rabbit used to be a magicians assistant but never finished her final performance. Henry becomes a Magician for the day.
Cake: Hattie needs help making a cake.
Moon: Stanley helps Sophie and Benjamin take a very special trip to the moon for their show and tell presentation.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Quacking Quandary: When Diesel hears a strange noise that sounds like a Swamp Monster, he gets too scared to pull deliveries through the area.
It's Time to Make a Journey Stick: JoJo and Gran Gran visit the woods, keeping a record of all they find on a journey stick.
Mr Peek Learns His Lines: The animals of Peek Zoo become very agitated when Mr Peek appears to turn into a grumpy Pirate!
Violet's Penguin Parade: Violet's Penguin Parade is always the high point of everyone's day.
Téann Mummy, Daddy, Peppa agus George chuig an bpáirc agus casann siad lena gcairde. Bíonn siad ag luascadh ar bharraí moncaí, ag léim ar ghéag, agus ag spraoi sa bpuiteach.
Taispeánann Grampy Rabbit an bád tarrthála do Peppa agus George.
Gearóid's tap is broken and so he can't water his plants. Bó takes a lovely bubble bath and Rúbaí tests the water from the well.
Pre-school series featuring an assortment of animal characters.
Pre-school series featuring an assortment of animal characters.
Gulliver is afraid. His friends organise a game of Pirates to make him feel braver.
Rat Run: Huey quickly finds Kenny and Reggie in a game of hide and seek. He suspects that Nemi is hiding in the tree, but is startled when he finds Rix, a mouse, instead.
Andy And The Bobcat: Andy heads to the Rocky Mountains of North America in search of the elusive bobcat
